questions.question: Evaluate \(\int (2x + 3)^4 \cdot 2 \, dx\)
questions.explanation: Let \(u = 2x + 3\), \(du = 2dx\). The integral becomes \(\int u^4 du = \frac{u^5}{5} + C = \frac{(2x+3)^5}{5} + C\).

questions.question: Evaluate \(\int x \cdot e^{x^2} \, dx\)
questions.explanation: Let \(u = x^2\), \(du = 2x dx\) so \(x dx = \frac{du}{2}\). Then \(\int e^u \cdot \frac{du}{2} = \frac{1}{2} e^u + C = \frac{1}{2} e^{x^2} + C\).

questions.question: Evaluate \(\int 3x^2 \cdot \sin(x^3) \, dx\)
questions.explanation: Let \(u = x^3\), \(du = 3x^2 dx\). The integral becomes \(\int \sin u \, du = -\cos u + C = -\cos(x^3) + C\).

questions.question: Evaluate \(\int \frac{2x}{x^2 + 1} \, dx\)
questions.explanation: Let \(u = x^2 + 1\), \(du = 2x dx\). The integral becomes \(\int \frac{1}{u} du = \ln|u| + C = \ln|x^2 + 1| + C\).

questions.question: Evaluate \(\int \cos(4x) \, dx\)
questions.explanation: Let \(u = 4x\), \(du = 4dx\) so \(dx = \frac{du}{4}\). Then \(\int \cos u \cdot \frac{du}{4} = \frac{1}{4} \sin u + C = \frac{1}{4} \sin(4x) + C\).

questions.question: Evaluate \(\int (5x^4) \cdot e^{x^5} \, dx\)
questions.explanation: Let \(u = x^5\), \(du = 5x^4 dx\). The integral becomes \(\int e^u du = e^u + C = e^{x^5} + C\).

questions.question: Evaluate \(\int \sec^2(3x) \, dx\)
questions.explanation: Let \(u = 3x\), \(du = 3dx\) so \(dx = \frac{du}{3}\). Then \(\int \sec^2 u \cdot \frac{du}{3} = \frac{1}{3} \tan u + C = \frac{1}{3} \tan(3x) + C\).

questions.question: Evaluate \(\int \frac{\ln x}{x} \, dx\)
questions.explanation: Let \(u = \ln x\), \(du = \frac{1}{x} dx\). Then \(\int u \, du = \frac{u^2}{2} + C = \frac{(\ln x)^2}{2} + C\).

scoreMessages.90: Excellent! You've mastered basic u-substitution. Ready for more challenging integrals!
scoreMessages.70: Good work! You understand the fundamentals. Review the ones you missed.
scoreMessages.50: Keep practicing! Focus on identifying u and du correctly.
scoreMessages.0: Review u-substitution basics: pick u, find du, substitute, integrate, and back-substitute.
